# Arts & Culture — 2008

Notable events, milestones, and developments in arts and culture from the year 2008.

<!-- BEGIN GENERATED: category-index — maintained by build-structure; do not edit by hand -->
| Topic | Summary |
|-------|---------|
| *The Dark Knight* (Jul 2008) | Christopher Nolan's Batman sequel opened July 18, 2008, earning over $1 billion worldwide; Heath Ledger's Joker performance won a posthumous Academy Award. |
| *Twilight* film (Nov 2008) | Summit Entertainment's adaptation of Stephenie Meyer's novel opened November 21, 2008, grossing over $392 million worldwide and launching one of the decade's most significant film franchises. |
